addon.notes:
# New
* When selecting the character to lot on an item in the pool, Alexandria now shows the total amount of item that character owns.
* Added the ability to list multiple single items on the AH at once.
* Added a "Hide Temp" toggle in Recent Items which allows filtering out Temporary Items.
* Moved Auto-Sort out of Organize to the main Settings tab under Behavior.
* Reworked Organize keep/bring list settings to be more simpler. Now includes 3 options:
Keep All - Keeps all of the specified item in inventory.
Bring Singles - Keeps a user defined amount of the item in inventory and brings items out of storage to meet the amount.
Bring Stacks - Keeps a user defined amount of stacks of an item in inventory and brings items out of storage to meet the amount.

# Bugfixes
* Fixed an issue where Auto-Lot/Auto-Pass actions when applied to All Characters would sometimes fail to apply to all characters.
* Fixed the Refresh button on AH Browse/Wishlist to now properly provide feedback that it is refreshing the results.
* Fixed an issue where the clickable area to add a currency to Starred was smaller than intended.
* Fixed an issue where Auction House stock listings for single/stack items in the Treasure Pool were showing incorrectly in some situations.
